holdings.infoBox: JGRO is an equity ETF with a total of 122 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 11.20%, Apple at 8.40%, Alphabet at 8.17%, Broadcom at 4.63%, and Microsoft at 4.46%.

overview.description: The JPMorgan Active Growth ETF (JGRO) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund is actively managed to invest in US large-cap companies perceived to have strong earnings growth potential. JGRO was launched on Aug 8, 2022 and is issued by JPMorgan Chase.
